description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and dress shoes. The figure stands with a relaxed posture, both hands in the pockets of the suit trousers, and the head slightly turned to one side, giving a casual yet confident demeanor. The suit jacket is tailored and fitted, with lapels and a visible seam structure, while the trousers are straight-cut and neatly pressed. The facial features are well-defined, and the hairstyle is short and neatly styled. The shoes are classic dress shoes, complementing the formal attire. The overall appearance suggests a professional individual, possibly a businessman or office worker, suitable for urban or corporate environments.
description: A well-dressed adult male in a tailored business suit, standing with hands in pockets and a confident, relaxed posture. The figure features detailed facial features, short styled hair, and classic dress shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, facial features, and relaxed stance with both hands in pockets.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the suit's fit, the straight posture, and the side of the face and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the suit's contour, the side of the face, and the relaxed arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands in pockets
